description_long: This object is a stylized tombstone made from a slab of marbled stone with a jagged, asymmetrical top. The front face features the bold, raised yellow letters 'RIP' near the top, signifying its function as a grave marker. Below the inscription, there is a sculpted relief of a shrouded figure or mask, rendered in white and protruding from the stone surface. The stone has a polished, veined appearance with a mix of cream, beige, and dark gray colors, giving it a realistic marble effect. The back of the tombstone is plain, with the marbled texture continuing but no inscriptions or reliefs. The overall form is relatively thin and upright, typical of headstones found in urban cemeteries or memorial parks.
description: A marbled stone tombstone with a yellow 'RIP' inscription and a white sculpted relief on the front, featuring a jagged top and polished surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow 'RIP' inscription and the white sculpted relief on the marbled stone surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the tombstone and the protrusion of the white relief.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain marbled stone surface with no inscriptions or reliefs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the thinness of the tombstone and the edge of the relief and inscription.
